thin.$description: Primitive font weight — thin. Maps to CSS font-weight: 100.

light.$description: Primitive font weight — light. Maps to CSS font-weight: 300.

regular.$description: Primitive font weight — regular. Maps to CSS font-weight: 400.

medium.$description: Primitive font weight — medium. Maps to CSS font-weight: 500.

semibold.$description: Primitive font weight — semibold. Maps to CSS font-weight: 600.

bold.$description: Primitive font weight — bold. Maps to CSS font-weight: 700.

extrabold.$description: Primitive font weight — extrabold. Maps to CSS font-weight: 800.

color.$description: Primitive shadow extra-small — color. Controls the shadow tint and opacity.

blur.$description: Primitive shadow extra-small — blur radius. Value in px.

spread.$description: Primitive shadow extra-small — spread. Value in px.

offset-x.$description: Primitive shadow extra-small — horizontal offset. Value in px.

offset-y.$description: Primitive shadow extra-small — vertical offset. Value in px.
